headline: AI Schism Grips Washington as Tech, Labor Vie for Upper Hand
summary: (Bloomberg) -- At a historic auditorium in Washington this week, Silicon Valley executives, Trump administration officials and members of Congress gathered in a sea of button-down shirts to extol the virtues of artificial intelligence.Two days later, labor leaders joined a handful of US lawmakers in a DC hotel ballroom to strategize how to fight back as AI threatens to displace workers and remake the global economy.The dueling events – one funded by top tech companies including OpenAI and Alphab

headline: Rosenblatt Reiterates Palantir (PLTR) Rating After Golden Dome Win
summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) is one of the 10 High Growth Mega Cap Stocks to Buy and Hold for Next 10 Years. On March 25, John McPeake of Rosenblatt Securities reiterated his Buy rating on Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR) and set a price target of $200, which implies over 25% upside from here.
